en: When reading it, you probably think that this word has four syllables and you might pronounce
ko: 읽으면 이 단어에 네 음절이 있다고 생각해서
ja: 読むと、この単語は4音節あると思って、
zhTW: 讀的時候，你可能覺得這個字有四個音節，
vi: Khi doc, ban co the nghi tu nay co bon am tiet va phat am

en: it as comfortable or comfortable. However, when we pronounce this word it just has three syllables.
ko: comfortable 또는 comfortable이라고 발음할 수 있어.
ja: comfortableまたはcomfortableと発音するかもしれない。でも実際は3音節だ。
zhTW: 可能會念成comfortable或comfortable。但我們念的時候只有三個音節。
vi: la comfortable hoac comfortable. Nhung khi phat am, tu nay chi co ba am tiet.

en: We would pronounce it as comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable.
vi: Chung ta phat am la comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable.
